evidence_summary: Establish John Carter's combat prowess and create a pivotal bond with Tars Tarkas.

During a chaotic battle between Tharks and Warhoons, John Carter's craft is downed. He intervenes in a life-or-death struggle to save Tars Tarkas from three Warhoon warriors, proving his worth through sheer strength.
Wide shots of the battlefield chaos
Medium tracking shots of Carter's descent
Close-ups of combat and eye contact between Carter and Tars Tarkas.
